testnet.notes: FRESH REPUBLISH 2026-06-04 (digest FmFja419…). mock_lender rebuilt as a real cToken/share money market mirroring Suilend/Scallop: suppliers receive SHARES priced by a global compounding `exchange_rate` (1e12 scale); `reserve_factor_bps` (1000 = 10%) routes the protocol's cut of accrued interest into a `reserves` balance claimable to the treasury via `claim_reserves` (on-chain yield spread). `supply`/`supply_into`/`redeem` mint/burn shares (round-down); `redeem` clamps to `backing` and never aborts; `accrue_interest` compounds the index per interaction; `set_apy` is forward-only. The one testnet concession: supplier interest is funded from a pre-seeded `backing` balance (admin `fund`) standing in for borrower repayments. spending_vault: deposit adds shares into the same Position (supply_into); withdraw redeems→splits→re-supplies remainder; public signatures unchanged so the app needs only id/config updates. NOTE: a fresh publish = new type ids, so prior Save positions + Merchant registrations from 0x2c778e1d… / 0x29d03305… are orphaned (re-register/re-deposit lazily). Backing still needs seeding with testnet USDC (mock_lender::fund) before yield pays out. Supersedes 0x2c778e1d… / upgrade 0x29d03305…
